title: elleanthus oliganthus
intro: Elleanthus oliganthus, also known as the mountain elleanthus, is a flowering plant species in the heath family (Ericaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of East Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Elleanthus oliganthus can be prepared as a tea or an infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, allowing for its medicinal properties to be absorbed and utilized for various health benefits.
